data.title: Knight Transportation: Buy Rating Reaffirmed on Attractive Post-Pullback Valuation and Outperformance in Tightening Truckload Market
data.description:
In a report released today, Ariel Rosa from Citi upgraded Knight Transportation to a Buy, with a price target of $64.00.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ariel Rosa has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, chiefly the recent share-price pullback that has reset Knight Transportation’s valuation to what he views as an attractive risk‑reward entry point. He believes the prior optimism around a freight cycle upturn had pushed the stock to excessive levels, but the subsequent decline, alongside still‑solid fundamentals, now creates a compelling dip‑buying opportunity.

Rosa also highlights that truckload spot rates are outperforming seasonal expectations amid a structural tightening of truck capacity, positioning KNX to benefit disproportionately given its one‑way truckload focus. In addition, he points to Knight’s historical ability to monetize freight cycle inflections, sophisticated fuel‑surcharge mechanisms that favor large carriers, and his above‑consensus earnings outlook, which collectively support his maintained $64 target price and the stock’s attractive expected return profile.

In another report released on March 3, Barclays also assigned a Buy rating to the stock with a $75.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
